Tin foil hat time with Larry Johnson!! We played Larry the clip from inside the ballroom. An Israeli mentalist is on stage doing a magic trick guessing the name of Karoline Leavitt's unborn child. The shots ring out. The women look shocked, then terrified. The mentalist barely reacts. Trump smirks at Melania. Larry: "When you run that one still photo, it makes it look like Trump's a little more concerned. But when you look at the full clip - he hears the shots, he's not reacting." That tells me he knew it was gonna happen. Melania though - is horrified. She's hearing the shots. She didn't know what was gonna happen." FULL EPISODE!! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 是时候戴上拉里·约翰逊（Larry Johnson）的锡纸帽了！！我们给拉里播放了宴会厅内的片段。一位以色列读心术师在台上表演魔术，猜卡罗琳·莱维特（Karoline Leavitt）未出生孩子的名字。枪声响起。女人们看起来很震惊，随后变得惊恐。读心术师几乎没有反应。特朗普对梅拉尼娅露出了冷笑。拉里：“当你播放那张静态照片时，看起来特朗普似乎更担心一些。但当你观看完整片段时——他听到了枪声，却没有任何反应。”这告诉我他知道会发生什么。但梅拉尼娅——她被吓坏了。她听到了枪声。她不知道会发生什么。”完整剧集！！🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender Large convoy of military vehicles with the Italian Army, including C1 Ariete Main Battle Tanks, Bergepanzer 2 Armored Recovery Vehicles, VCC-80 Dardo Infantry Fighting Vehicles, and other equipment, spotted moving through the French village of Germigny-des-Prés during the recent French-led multinational high-intensity warfare exercise, ORION 26. Video credit: @NichoConcu tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 一支庞大的意大利陆军军车车队，包括C1“公羊”（Ariete）主战坦克、Bergepanzer 2装甲抢修车、VCC-80“标枪”（Dardo）步兵战车以及其他装备，在最近由法国领导的多国高强度战争演习“猎户座26”（ORION 26）期间，被发现穿过法国热尔米尼代普雷（Germigny-des-Prés）村庄。视频来源：@NichoConcu 推文

text: WarMonitor People would still call it ICE, just like we still call the DOD the Department of Defense. The President signals his desire to change the name of Immigration and Customs Enforcement to NICE so the media will have to refer to ICE agents as NICE agents… not sure wtf I just wrote but whatever https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2048598874005401838/photo/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: 战争观察员：人们仍然会称其为ICE，就像我们仍然称国防部为DOD一样。总统表示希望将移民和海关执法局（ICE）更名为NICE，这样媒体就必须将ICE特工称为NICE特工……我不确定我刚才写了什么，但随便吧 https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2048598874005401838/photo/1 - Acyn 推文

text: 🐻 Start your week right by catching up on all the key news of the past 24 hours: ➡️ Russian Ministry of Defense issues a statement about the situation in Mali , and here's what is known about Kidal , and why it might be early for the West to declare victory ➡️ If you don't understand the whole Mali situation - watch this ➡️ Malian government confirmed the death of Defense Minister General Sadio Camara, killed during coordinated terrorist attacks on April 25. ➡️ Ukrainians in Poland are protesting against the corruption of the Zelensky regime ➡️ Kharkov is experiencing major issues with power ➡️ А cargo vessel was seized off the Somali coast ➡️ Russian Defense Minister awards the North Korean fighters who helped liberate the Kursk region ➡️ Trump comments on the shooters manifesto , and declares he is not a pedophile ➡️ Larry Johnson breaks down the security failures at last night's assassination attempt on our show ➡️ Iranian Foreign Minister visited Oman, and arrives in Moscow 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTtechnical A group of budget airlines including Frontier and Avelo are asking the US government for a $2.5 billion rescue package to alleviate high jet fuel prices caused by the Iran War -WSJ The package could give the US government equity stakes in the airlines. tweet

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Southern Command: "On April 26, at the direction of SOUTHCOM commander Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a lethal kinetic strike on a vessel operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations. Intelligence confirmed the vessel was transiting along known narco-trafficking routes in the Eastern Pacific and was engaged in narco-trafficking operations. Three male narco-terrorists were killed during this action. No U.S. military forces were harmed." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国南方司令部：“4月26日，在南方司令部司令弗朗西斯·L·多诺万将军的指示下，南方之矛联合特遣部队对一艘由指定恐怖组织运营的船只进行了致命的动能打击。情报证实，该船只正沿东太平洋已知的毒品走私路线航行，并参与了毒品走私活动。三名男性毒品恐怖分子在此次行动中被击毙。没有美国军事人员受伤。” 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 ⚡️ Seyed Abbas Araghchi, Iran’s Foreign Minister, arrived in Saint Petersburg early Monday to meet and hold talks with Vladimir Putin, as part of his ongoing regional tour following two rounds of negotiations in Islamabad and a recent visit to Oman over the past three days, according to Islamic Republic News Agency. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 ⚡️ 据伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社报道，伊朗外交部长赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格希于周一早些时候抵达圣彼得堡，将会见弗拉基米尔·普京并举行会谈。这是他继伊斯兰堡两轮谈判和过去三天对阿曼的访问后，正在进行的地区巡访的一部分。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has arrived in St. Petersburg to hold talks with Russian President Vladimir Putin. @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender During his interview with 60 Minutes, President Trump defended the actions of the U.S. Secret Service as well as what the shooter called in his manifesto “incompetent” security measures at last night’s White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, stating: “Well, he was pretty incompetent too because he got caught. And he got caught pretty easily. So I'd say he was pretty incompetent too. You know, I could take any event having to do with security or anything else. I can always find fault. Those guys did a good job last night. They did a really good job.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在接受《60分钟》采访时，特朗普总统为美国特勤局的行动进行了辩护，同时也回应了枪手在其宣言中称昨晚在华盛顿举行的白宫记者协会晚宴上的安保措施“无能”的说法，他表示：“嗯，他也相当无能，因为他被抓住了。而且他被抓得很容易。所以我说他也相当无能。你知道，我可以对任何与安保或其他方面有关的活动挑出毛病。那些人昨晚做得很好。他们做得非常好。” 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from U.S. Southern Command (SOUTHCOM), at the direction of SOUTHCOM Commander General Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a strike on a vessel operated by a designated terrorist organization in the eastern Pacific Ocean. The vessel was operating in known trafficking routes. Three narco-terrorists were killed in the strike. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国南方司令部（SOUTHCOM）发布的消息，在南方司令部司令弗朗西斯·L·多诺万将军的指示下，南方之矛联合特遣部队在东太平洋对一艘由指定恐怖组织运营的船只进行了打击。该船只在已知的走私路线上航行。三名毒品恐怖分子在打击中被击毙。 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump is expected to hold a situation room meeting tomorrow, as Iran gives the U.S. a new proposal for reaching a deal on the reopening of the Hormuz Strait, lifting the naval blockade first and postponing nuclear negotiations for a later stage — Axios tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普预计将于明天召开战情室会议，因为伊朗向美国提出了一项关于达成重新开放霍尔木兹海峡协议的新提议，即先解除海上封锁，并将核谈判推迟到后期阶段 — Axios 推文

text: OSINTdefender Iranian officials have presented the United States a new proposal, via Pakistani mediators, to end the Iran War and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with nuclear negotiations postponed for a later stage, according to a U.S. official and two sources with knowledge who spoke to Axios. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048577017692479588/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据一位美国官员和两名知情人士向Axios透露，伊朗官员已通过巴基斯坦调解人向美国提出了一项新提议，旨在结束伊朗战争并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，同时将核谈判推迟到后期阶段。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048577017692479588/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor The suspect left a 10th-floor room at the Washington Hilton armed and used an interior stairwell to bypass monitored areas, reaching the terrace level near the ballroom entrance before sprinting toward the WHCD event. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048576933345014007/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 嫌疑人离开华盛顿希尔顿酒店10楼的房间，携带武器并利用内部楼梯绕过监控区域，到达宴会厅入口附近的露台层，随后冲向白宫记者协会晚宴现场。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048576933345014007/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @BarakRavid : 🚨 President Trump is expected to hold on Monday a situation room meeting on Iran with his top national security and foreign policy team 🚨 The meeting is expected to discuss the current stalemate in the negotiations with Iran and potential options for the next steps in the war NEW: Iran gave the U.S. a new proposal for reaching a deal on the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and lifting the naval blockade first, and postponing nuclear negotiations for a later stage. My story on @axios https://www.axios.com/2026/04/27/iran-us-hormuz-strait-nuclear-talks-proposal-pakistan - Barak Ravid tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @BarakRavid : 🚨 特朗普总统预计将于周一与他的高级国家安全和外交政策团队就伊朗问题召开战情室会议 🚨 会议预计将讨论目前与伊朗谈判的僵局以及战争下一步的潜在选择。最新消息：伊朗向美国提出了一项新提议，旨在达成重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并首先解除海上封锁的协议，并将核谈判推迟到后期阶段。我在 @axios 上的报道 https://www.axios.com/2026/04/27/iran-us-hormuz-strait-nuclear-talks-proposal-pakistan - Barak Ravid 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios: U.S. President Trump will hold a situation room meeting on Iran with his top national security and foreign policy team this Monday to discuss the deadlock in negotiations with Iran. Iran presented the U.S. with a new deal on reopening the Strait of Hormuz and ending the conflict through Pakistani mediators. During discussions with Pakistani, Turkish, Egyptian, and Qatari mediators that there is still no consensus amongst Iranian officials as how to address the U.S.'s demands that they suspend their nuclear program. The new proposal entails the nuclear negotiations starting after the Strait has been reopened and the blockade lifted, with the ceasefire being extended for a long period so that both parties can find a permenant solution to the conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：美国总统特朗普将于本周一与他的高级国家安全和外交政策团队在战情室举行会议，讨论与伊朗谈判陷入僵局的问题。伊朗通过巴基斯坦调解人向美国提出了一项关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并结束冲突的新协议。在与巴基斯坦、土耳其、埃及和卡塔尔调解人的讨论中，伊朗官员对于如何应对美国要求其暂停核计划的要求仍未达成共识。新提案的内容是，在海峡重新开放和封锁解除后开始核谈判，并将停火协议延长较长时间，以便双方能够找到解决冲突的永久方案。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. SOUTHCOM says Joint Task Force Southern Spear carried out a lethal strike on a vessel in the eastern Pacific transiting narcotics routes, killing three alleged traffickers. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国南方司令部表示，南方之矛联合特遣部队在东太平洋的毒品走私路线上对一艘船只进行了致命打击，击毙了三名涉嫌贩毒的人员。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor U.S. consumer sentiment fell to a record low in April, hitting 49.8, according to Reuters, as households remain focused on inflation fallout despite the Iran ceasefire. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048570901130576130/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 据路透社报道，4月份美国消费者信心指数跌至49.8的历史低点，尽管伊朗实现了停火，但家庭仍关注通胀带来的影响。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048570901130576130/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 WaPo: The Trump administration reportedly provided a lower level of security for the White House Correspondents’ Dinner than for other events involving senior officials. The event was not designated a National Special Security Event, a status that would normally place the Secret Service in charge of coordinating enhanced protection for major gatherings of senior leaders. Officials said the concentration of leadership in one venue created unusual vulnerability had the attack been successful. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 《华盛顿邮报》：据报道，特朗普政府为白宫记者协会晚宴提供的安保级别低于其他涉及高级官员的活动。该活动未被指定为“国家特别安全事件”，而这一地位通常会使特勤局负责协调针对高级领导人大型聚会的加强保护措施。官员们表示，领导人集中在一个场所，如果袭击成功，将造成不同寻常的脆弱性。@wfwitness

text: From today's stream! Larry Johnson breaks down the security failures at last night's assassination attempt Larry checked with his Secret Service colleague - the same guy who took over Reagan's detail and had to secure THIS SAME HOTEL after Hinckley. Here's how it's SUPPOSED to work: 🔸 Perimeter around the hotel - nobody walks in off the street 🔸 Secure all entrances including delivery areas 🔸 Metal detectors + minimum 2 armed officers ready to shoot if someone rushes through What actually happened: 🔸 Guy was a hotel guest, came down an elevator carrying a shotgun should have been someone at that checkpoint. 🔸 Rushed through the next checkpoint, didn't get shot "because there was nobody there ready to shoot him." Then HE starts shooting. 🔸 After it's over, Secret Service pulls guns and appears to fire at him - "yet when he is down on the ground, you don't see a single bullet hole in him." FULL EPISODE!! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 来自今天的直播！拉里·约翰逊分析了昨晚暗杀企图中的安保失误。拉里咨询了他的特勤局同事——那个曾接手里根安保工作，并在欣克利事件后负责保护“同一家酒店”的人。以下是“应该”的工作流程：🔸 酒店周边设置警戒线——禁止外人随意进入 🔸 确保所有入口（包括送货区）的安全 🔸 金属探测器 + 至少2名武装人员，准备在有人冲入时开火。实际发生的情况：🔸 那个人是酒店住客，带着一把霰弹枪从电梯下来，检查站本应有人值守。🔸 冲过了下一个检查站，没有被击中，“因为那里没有人准备开火”。然后他开始射击。🔸 事后，特勤局拔枪并似乎向他开火——“然而当他倒在地上时，你却看不到他身上有一个弹孔。”完整剧集！！🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Norah O'Donnell: In his manifesto, he wrote that 'I'm no longer willing to permit a pedophile, rapist, and traitor to coat my hands with his crimes.' What's your reaction? U.S. President Donald Trump: "I was waiting for you to read that because I knew you would because you're horrible people. I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody. I'm not a pedophile. Excuse me. You read that crap from a sick person. I was totally exonerated. You should be ashamed of yourself, reading that. You're a disgrace." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 诺拉·奥唐奈：他在宣言中写道：“我不再愿意允许一个恋童癖、强奸犯和叛徒用他的罪行玷污我的双手。”你对此有何反应？美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“我一直在等你读这段话，因为我知道你会读，因为你们是可怕的人。我不是强奸犯。我没有强奸任何人。我不是恋童癖。请原谅。你读的是一个病态的人写的垃圾。我完全被免罪了。你应该为你读这些感到羞耻。你真是丢脸。”推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Colombia’s Environment Minister says the country is leading the way on transitioning away from fossil fuels and "listening to the science," however "the stress of the fiscal and the external debt is huge, but we have to continue working on that." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048562275720589391/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息——哥伦比亚环境部长表示，该国正在引领向化石燃料转型的道路，并“听取科学意见”，但“财政和外债的压力巨大，但我们必须继续为此努力。”https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048562275720589391/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : U.S. President Donald J. Trump has released a security camera video showing Cole Thomas Allen, 31, the suspected shooter at tonight’s White House Correspondents’ Dinner, attempting to run past law enforcement and U.S. Secret Service Agents. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048232009521062075/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @sentdefender：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普发布了一段监控视频，显示今晚白宫记者协会晚宴的嫌疑枪手、31岁的科尔·托马斯·艾伦试图冲过执法人员和美国特勤局特工。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048232009521062075/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump attacks 60 Minutes and CBS News correspondent Norah O'Donnell during today’s interview, calling them a “disgrace,” after he was read a quote from the manifesto of Cole Thomas Allen, the shooter in last night’s attempted attack on the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington. Interviewer: “The so-called manifesto is a stunning thing to read, Mr. President. He appears to reference a motive in it. He writes this quote, ‘Administration officials, they are targets.’ And he also wrote this, ‘I am no longer willing to permit a pedophile, rapist, and traitor to coat my hands with his crimes.’ What's your reaction to that?” President Trump: “Well, I was waiting for you to read that because I knew you would because you're horrible people. Horrible people. Yeah, he did write that. I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody. I'm not a pedophile.” Interviewer: “Do you think he was referring to you?” President Trump: “Excuse me. I'm not a pedophile. You read that crap from some sick person. I got associated with stuff that has nothing to do with me. I was totally exonerated. Your friends on the other side of the plate are the ones that were involved with, let's say, Epstein or other things. But I said to myself, you know, I'll do this interview and they'll probably... I read the manifesto. You know, he's a sick person. But... You should be ashamed of yourself reading that because I'm not any of those things. You're a disgrace. But go ahead. Let's finish the interview. You're disgraceful.” tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在今天的采访中抨击了《60分钟》和哥伦比亚广播公司新闻记者诺拉·奥唐奈，称他们是“耻辱”，此前他被宣读了科尔·托马斯·艾伦的宣言中的一段话，此人是昨晚针对华盛顿白宫记者协会晚宴袭击未遂事件的枪手。采访者：“所谓的宣言读起来令人震惊，总统先生。他似乎在其中提到了动机。他写了这段话，‘政府官员，他们是目标。’他还写道，‘我不再愿意允许一个恋童癖、强奸犯和叛徒用他的罪行玷污我的双手。’你对此有何反应？”特朗普总统：“嗯，我一直在等你读这段话，因为我知道你会读，因为你们是可怕的人。可怕的人。是的，他确实写了。我不是强奸犯。我没有强奸任何人。我不是恋童癖。”采访者：“你认为他指的是你吗？”特朗普总统：“请原谅。我不是恋童癖。你读的是某个病态的人写的垃圾。我被卷入了一些与我无关的事情。我完全被免罪了。你们在另一边的朋友才是那些参与了，比如说，爱泼斯坦或其他事情的人。但我对自己说，你知道，我会接受这次采访，他们可能会……我读了那份宣言。你知道，他是个病态的人。但是……你应该为你读这些感到羞耻，因为我不是那些东西中的任何一个。你真是丢脸。但继续吧。让我们完成采访。你真是丢人。”推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸U.S. President Trump fired back at the accusation that he is a pedophile and rapist. Reporter: "The so called manifesto is a stunning thing to read, mister president. He appears to reference a motive in it. He writes this quote, administration officials…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump on political violence in the U.S.: "You know, you go back twenty years, forty years, a hundred years, two hundred years, five hundred years, it's always been there. People are assassinated. People are injured. People are hurt. And I'm not sure that there's any more now than there was. I do think that the hate speech of the Democrats, much more so, is very dangerous. I really think it's very dangerous to the country." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸美国总统特朗普反驳了关于他是恋童癖和强奸犯的指控。记者：‘总统先生，所谓的宣言读起来令人震惊。他似乎在其中提到了动机。他写道，行政官员……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈及美国政治暴力：“你知道，回溯二十年、四十年、一百年、两百年、五百年，这种情况一直存在。有人被暗杀。有人受伤。有人受到伤害。我不确定现在的情况是否比过去更严重。我确实认为民主党的仇恨言论要危险得多。我真的认为这对国家来说非常危险。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸U.S. President Trump on how the shooter managed to get through security: Reporter: "You can see the gunman running through the metal detectors, and he fired off one or two rounds. His speed was rather incredible. Actually, it was it was like a blur.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump fired back at the accusation that he is a pedophile and rapist. Reporter: "The so called manifesto is a stunning thing to read, mister president. He appears to reference a motive in it. He writes this quote, administration officials, they are targets. And he also wrote this, I'm no longer willing to permit a pedophile, rapist, and traitor to coat my hands with his crimes. What's your reaction to..." Trump: "I was waiting for you to read that because I knew you would because you're you're you're horrible people, Horrible people. Yeah. He did write that. I'm I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody." Reporter: "Oh, you think he was referring to you?" Trump: "Excuse me. I'm not a pedophile. You read that crap from some sick person. I got associated with all stuff that has nothing to do with me. I was totally exonerated. Your friends on the other side of the plate are the ones that were involved with, let's say, Epstein or other things." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸美国总统特朗普谈及枪手如何通过安检：记者：‘你可以看到枪手跑过金属探测器，他开了两枪。他的速度快得惊人。实际上，就像一道残影……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普反驳了关于他是恋童癖和强奸犯的指控。记者：‘总统先生，所谓的宣言读起来令人震惊。他似乎在其中提到了动机。他写道，行政官员，他们是目标。他还写道，我不再愿意允许一个恋童癖、强奸犯和叛徒用他的罪行弄脏我的手。你对此有何反应……’” 特朗普：“我一直在等你读那段，因为我知道你会读，因为你们是……你们是……你们是可怕的人，可怕的人。是的，他确实写了。我……我不是强奸犯。我没有强奸任何人。” 记者：“哦，你认为他指的是你吗？” 特朗普：“对不起。我不是恋童癖。你读的是某个病态的人写的垃圾。我被卷入了一些与我无关的事情。我完全被平反了。你们在餐桌另一边的朋友才是那些与爱泼斯坦或其他事情有关的人。” @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Great social skills at work here. Norah O'Donnell: He had a lot of anti-Christian rhetoric. He was part of a group called the Wide Awake. He had attended a No Kings protest in California. Trump: I'm not a king. If I was a king, I wouldn't be dealing with you. https://twitter.com/BlueGeorgia/status/2048545153221099820/video/1 - Blue Georgia tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这里展现了伟大的社交技巧。诺拉·奥唐奈（Norah O'Donnell）：他有很多反基督教的言论。他是“保持清醒”（Wide Awake）组织的一员。他参加了加利福尼亚州的“不要国王”（No Kings）抗议活动。特朗普：我不是国王。如果我是国王，我就不会在这里应付你们了。 https://twitter.com/BlueGeorgia/status/2048545153221099820/video/1 - Blue Georgia 推文

text: WarMonitor Awkward. TRUMP: I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody O'DONNELL: Oh, you think he was referring to you? https://x.com/atrupar/status/2048542347869192532/video/1 - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 尴尬。特朗普：我不是强奸犯。我没有强奸任何人。奥唐奈：哦……你认为他指的是你吗？ https://x.com/atrupar/status/2048542347869192532/video/1 - Aaron Rupar 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from U.S. Central Command, the U.S. blockade of vessels traveling to and from Iranian ports has redirected or directed to turn back a total of 38 vessels. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048554057564876974/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国中央司令部发布的消息，美国对往返伊朗港口的船只实施的封锁已导致总计38艘船只改道或被迫折返。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048554057564876974/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command A U.S. Sailor watches a commercial ship as U.S. forces continue to enforce a blockade against Iranian ports, preventing ships from entering or exiting. American forces have directed 38 ships to turn around, or return to port. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 一名美国水手正在监视一艘商船，美军继续对伊朗港口实施封锁，阻止船只进出。美军已指示38艘船只掉头或返回港口。推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump asks why all the "anti-Trump and anti-Christian rhetoric" in the manifesto is not being read out, and comments on the shooter attending No Kings protest: "The reason you have people like that is you have people doing No Kings, I'm not a king... if I was a king, I wouldn't be dealing with you." tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普质问为什么宣言中所有“反特朗普和反基督教的言论”没有被读出来，并评论了枪手参加“不要国王”抗议活动一事：“你之所以有这样的人，是因为有人在搞‘不要国王’，我不是国王……如果我是国王，我就不会在这里应付你们了。” 推文
